_comment: Vision OS 3.0 headless profile, passed via --settings to every unattended claude -p run (System/run.ps1). This file IS the no-egress guarantee: WebFetch and WebSearch are denied, every shell verb that can reach the network is denied, and the allow list names only the non-network commands the routines genuinely need. The runner launches with --strict-mcp-config and no MCP config, so no MCP server loads. In -p mode there is no one to ask, so anything not allowed here is refused: the absence of a rule is a closed gate. Writes are scoped to Vault/ only and the rail files (.gitignore, CLAUDE.md, System/, .claude/) are explicitly denied - an unattended run processing untrusted inbox content can never widen its own rails. Ledgers are closed to this session entirely: the model stages its close record at Vault/desk/.run-close-<run_id>.json and the runner transcribes it. git push is allowed to the backup remote only. robocopy is allowed for in-tree moves: it has no network reach unless handed a UNC path, which the routines never are.
